since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.37%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.72% · Gold +1.10% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.37%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.37%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +5.67%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +5.67%, MRVL +5.52%, MU +5.25%, LRCX +5.18%, AMAT +5.11%. Laggards: CRM -4.25%, IBM -3.99%, EQIX -3.58%, NOW -3.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.30% at $150.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.30% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
